digest.component_or_area: plan-review-gate ground-truth corpora and adjudication harnesses
propositions: Freeze two versioned ground-truth corpora (outcome + finding-adjudication) under plan-review-gate/runs with committed provenance, without changing gate/source code.

Mine one outcome-corpus row per reviewed ticket with derived counts (reopen_count, force_close, completion_verifier_fail_count, review_round_count) and a closed post_claim_edit_class vocabulary assigned via reopen-window and precedence rules.
On-disk active+.retired event scanning is insufficient for compacted tickets, so a git-object walk of the tickets branch is the required primary recovery path for full event history.
Findings must be bucketed as surfaced vs dropped by positional coverage.counts segments rather than by the ambiguous decision field, and text-less findings are excluded as unadjudicatable.
Two independent LLM raters (opus-4-8 and sonnet-5) double-label a stratified subset; kappa is reported honestly (kappa≈0.47, AC1≈0.58, raw 0.77) rather than used as a ship/discard gate.

The LLM-labeled and human-adjudicated labels are invalidated because the adjudication harness truncated plan context (PLAN_CAP=6000) and lacked agentic code-grounding tools, unlike production; the corrected approach reuses production context assembly and grounded judging while outcome_corpus and the finding sample survive.
